name: Bockwurst Braised in Ale with Homemade Sauerkraut
recipeIngredient: Salt and Fresh Ground Pepper to Taste
2 Pounds Fresh Bockwurst or Other White Sausage
recipeInstructions:
1. Add ale, bay leaf, cloves, brown sugar, salt, and pepper to a saucepan. Simmer for 3-4 minutes.
2. Add the Bockwurst and simmer slowly, covered, for 4-5 minutes or until warmed through and plump.
3. Drain the sauerkraut and rinse (if necessary) to reduce strength.
4. In a non-reactive saucepan, add sauerkraut, apple juice, caraway seeds, salt, and pepper. Simmer slowly, partially covered, for 20-30 minutes or until most juices are absorbed.
5. To serve: Mound sauerkraut on warm plates and top with steamed Bockwurst and a generous dollop of Honey Beer Mustard.
Yield: 6 servings
